name: apply_leave
description: Apply for leave on behalf of an employee. Creates a leave request that will be pending approval. The leave balance must be sufficient.

leave_type.description: Type of leave. Must be one of: 'annual_leave', 'medical_leave', 'unpaid_leave'

start_date.description: Start date of leave in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. '2026-02-16'

end_date.description: End date of leave in YYYY-MM-DD format (inclusive), e.g. '2026-02-17'

reason.description: Reason for taking leave, e.g. 'Family vacation'
